root_text.sn22.107:1.5: Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā imesaṁ pañcannaṁ upādānakkhandhānaṁ assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ nappajānanti …pe…
root_text.sn22.107:1.6: pajānanti, sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja viharantī”ti.

translation_text.sn22.107:1.2: “Mendicants, there are these five grasping aggregates.
translation_text.sn22.107:1.4: That is, the grasping aggregates of form, feeling, perception, choices, and consciousness.
translation_text.sn22.107:1.5: There are ascetics and brahmins who don’t truly understand these five grasping aggregates’ gratification, drawback, and escape …
translation_text.sn22.107:1.6: There are ascetics and brahmins who do truly understand …”
